description.p: Kinema is a native Linux desktop application for discovering movies and TV series. Search a title or paste an IMDB id, browse available torrent sources with quality and size information, and either grab a magnet link or — with a Real-Debrid subscription — stream the file directly in mpv or VLC.

ul.li: Metadata-rich search with posters, descriptions, and ratings
Sortable torrent list with quality, size, seeder, and provider information
One-click magnet copy or open with the system default torrent handler
Optional Real-Debrid integration for instant streaming of cached releases
First-class KDE Plasma integration with secure credential storage
